title: Tesla Autopilot Sees Record Crash Reports and App Updates
description: Recent reports indicate a rise in Tesla Autopilot and FSD crashes, while the company updates its app interface.

sources.title: Tesla Autopilot and FSD crashes hit record 207 in a single month
Tesla Hits a New Record for Autopilot and FSD Crashes
Tesla Launches Dedicated Self-Driving Section in Tesla App

sections.heading: Record Crash Reports
paragraphs: According to Electrek, Tesla Autopilot and Full Self-Driving (FSD) crashes hit a record of 207 in a single month.
Autoguide.com also reported that Tesla hit a new record for Autopilot and FSD crashes.

sections.heading: Application Updates
paragraphs: Not a Tesla App reported that Tesla launched a dedicated self-driving section in the Tesla app.

sections.heading: Search Interest Data
paragraphs: Google Trends reported a search volume lower bound of 1,000 for the term "tesla autopilot" in the US region.
The trend feed was published on July 22, 2026.

faq.q: What is the reported number of crashes according to Electrek?
faq.a: Electrek reported that Tesla Autopilot and FSD crashes hit a record 207 in a single month.

faq.q: What new feature did Not a Tesla App identify?
faq.a: Not a Tesla App reported that Tesla launched a dedicated self-driving section in the Tesla app.
